features.name: Project Scaffolding
features.description: Package structure, pyproject.toml, init.sh, feature_list.json, progress.md

features.name: cli.py — Argument Parsing and Dispatch
features.description: argparse for all six commands with correct flags, mutual exclusion, exit codes

features.name: disc.py — BurnBackend Interface
features.description: BurnBackend ABC, DiscInfo dataclass, DiscBackend, ISOBackend, double-burn guard

features.name: manifest.py — Session Manifest Read/Write/Merge
features.description: Manifest schema, atomic write, checksum validation, disc state replay, SUSPECT marking

features.name: delta.py — xdelta3 Wrapper
features.description: compute_delta, apply_delta, threshold logic, per-file logging, ThreadPoolExecutor

features.name: session.py — Staging Directory Construction
features.description: build_staging: scan, diff, cache/disc fallback, encrypt, space check, SIGINT cleanup

features.name: cache.py — Local Cache Management
features.description: cache_get, cache_put, disc fallback, cache-miss logging, correctness independence

features.name: restore.py — Reconstruct from Disc/ISO
features.description: restore(): manifest replay, delta chain, decrypt, checksum verify, non-destructive default

features.name: verify.py — Integrity Checking
features.description: fast/checksum/full levels, per-session status, post-burn auto-verify, exit 1 on error

features.name: CLI Commands — End-to-End Wiring
features.description: init, sync, restore, history, verify, status wired to their handler modules

features.name: Configuration (config.toml)
features.description: tomllib/tomli parse, all defaults, CLI flag overrides, optional config file

features.name: Logging
features.description: Structured plaintext log, INFO/WARN/ERROR/SUSPECT levels, capacity thresholds, cron silence

features.name: Dry-Run Mode
features.description: --dry-run: full pipeline minus burn/cache, rsync-style output, space report

features.name: Idempotency
features.description: init on existing disc, sync no-change silence, interrupted burn recovery, staging rebuild

features.name: Tests
features.description: Unit: delta, manifest, crypto. Integration: full cycle, dry-run, SIGINT, interrupted burn
